functions.name: useEffect without exhaustive deps
functions.description: useEffect missing dependencies in deps array. This can cause stale closures.

recommendation.title: Add exhaustive deps to useEffect
recommendation.description: useEffect missing dependencies in deps array. This can cause stale closures.

fix: Add all dependencies to deps array

action.message: useEffect with empty deps using state - missing dependencies

functions.name: useEffect with empty deps + state
functions.description: useEffect with empty deps array that updates state can cause infinite loop.

recommendation.title: Fix infinite loop in useEffect
recommendation.description: useEffect with empty deps array that updates state can cause infinite loop.

action.message: Potential infinite loop - useEffect with empty deps calling setState

functions.name: Hooks called conditionally
functions.description: React hooks must be called unconditionally at the top level of a component.

recommendation.title: Move hooks outside conditionals
recommendation.description: React hooks must be called unconditionally at the top level of a component.

action.message: React hooks called conditionally - must be called unconditionally

functions.name: Map without keys
functions.description: Missing key prop in list rendering. Keys help React identify changed items.

recommendation.title: Add key prop to list items
recommendation.description: Missing key prop in list rendering. Keys help React identify changed items.

functions.name: useCallback without proper deps
functions.description: useCallback without proper dependencies can lead to stale closures.

recommendation.title: Add proper dependencies to useCallback
recommendation.description: useCallback without proper dependencies can lead to stale closures.

functions.name: Expensive computation in render
functions.description: Non-reactive values computed in render cause unnecessary re-renders.

recommendation.title: Use useMemo for expensive computations
recommendation.description: Non-reactive values computed in render cause unnecessary re-renders.

action.message: Expensive computation without useMemo - may cause unnecessary re-renders

functions.name: Component with random values
functions.description: Components with random values in render cause unnecessary re-renders and break reconciliation.

recommendation.title: Remove random values from render
recommendation.description: Components with random values in render cause unnecessary re-renders and break reconciliation.

fix: Move random values to useMemo with dependencies
Generate random values in parent and pass as props

action.message: Random values in component may cause unnecessary re-renders

functions.name: Duplicate keys in lists
functions.description: Duplicate keys cause incorrect rendering and reconciliation issues.

recommendation.title: Fix duplicate keys in lists
recommendation.description: Duplicate keys cause incorrect rendering and reconciliation issues.

fix: Generate IDs with a proper ID generator
Avoid using array index as key

functions.name: Legacy shouldComponentUpdate
functions.description: shouldComponentUpdate is deprecated. Use React.memo for function components.

recommendation.title: Use React.memo instead of shouldComponentUpdate
recommendation.description: shouldComponentUpdate is deprecated. Use React.memo for function components.

fix: Convert to functional component with React.memo

action.message: shouldComponentUpdate is deprecated - use React.memo instead

functions.name: Direct DOM manipulation
functions.description: Direct DOM manipulation bypasses React reconciliation. Use refs sparingly.

recommendation.title: Avoid direct DOM manipulation
recommendation.description: Direct DOM manipulation bypasses React reconciliation. Use refs sparingly.

action.message: Direct DOM manipulation bypasses React - use refs sparingly

functions.name: Mutating context value
functions.description: Mutating context value directly breaks reactivity. Use setState.

recommendation.title: Don't mutate context value
recommendation.description: Mutating context value directly breaks reactivity. Use setState.

fix: Create update methods in context provider

functions.name: forwardRef without useImperativeHandle
functions.description: forwardRef without useImperativeHandle can leak implementation details.

recommendation.title: Use useImperativeHandle with forwardRef
recommendation.description: forwardRef without useImperativeHandle can leak implementation details.

fix: Use useImperativeHandle to expose specific methods
Consider not using ref at all

action.message: Consider using useImperativeHandle with forwardRef for better encapsulation

functions.name: Async function in render
functions.description: Async functions in render cause issues. Use useEffect for async operations.

recommendation.title: Don't use async functions in render
recommendation.description: Async functions in render cause issues. Use useEffect for async operations.

fix: Use event handlers for async actions
Call setState in callbacks, not directly in render

functions.name: .bind() in render method
functions.description: Binding functions in render creates new functions on each render. Use useCallback.

recommendation.title: Don't bind in render
recommendation.description: Binding functions in render creates new functions on each render. Use useCallback.

catches: Creating new function on every render
fix: Use arrow functions in class properties

action.message: Binding in render creates new function each render - use useCallback

functions.name: Mutating state object directly
functions.description: Mutating state directly breaks React. Always use setState with new object.

recommendation.title: Don't mutate state object
recommendation.description: Mutating state directly breaks React. Always use setState with new object.

fix: Create new object with spread operator
Always return new object from setState

action.message: State mutation detected - create new object instead of spreading

functions.name: Component without PropTypes or TypeScript
functions.description: Components should have typed props for better maintainability and catch bugs early.

recommendation.title: Add types to React components
recommendation.description: Components should have typed props for better maintainability and catch bugs early.

params.message: Component should have PropTypes or TypeScript interface for props

functions.name: useEffect may have missing dependencies
functions.description: Missing dependencies in useEffect can cause stale closure bugs.

recommendation.title: Add exhaustive deps to useEffect
recommendation.description: Missing dependencies in useEffect can cause stale closure bugs.
